AssignmentLocationResponse.title: AssignmentLocation

city.description: The city that the deployment is located in.

country.description: The country that the deployment is located in.

continent.description: The continent that the deployment is located in.

administrative_division.description: The administrative division that the deployment is located in.

timezone.description: The timezone that the deployment is located in.

AssignmentLocationResponse.description: Describes the location of a deployment.

AssignmentPortResponse.title: AssignmentPort

internal.description:
The port number that the process uses to listen for incoming connections.
This is the port that you configured in your game server.

external.description:
The port number that the game server is listening on.
This is the port that was dynamically assigned during your deployments, and is used to connect to the game
server. Requests made to this port will be forwarded to the internal port inside the deployment.

link.description: The link including the FQDN of the deployment and the port number that the game server is listening on.

protocol.description: The protocol that the game server is using.

AssignmentPortResponse.description: Describes a port that a game server is listening on.

team_id.description:
ID of the team that the group's members have been assigned to.
Null until the group has been matched into a team.

is_ready.description: If the member is ready to start

ticket_id.description:
The ticket id of the member in the matchmaking queue.
Only available once the member has been assigned a match.

team_id.description:
ID of the team that the group's members have been assigned to.
Null until the group has been matched into a team.

profile.description:
The name of the matchmaking profile that the ticket is associated with.
This is used to determine which ruleset will be used to match the ticket.

created_at.description: The time that the ticket was created.

message.description: A message indicating what went wrong with the request.
message.example: Some description of the error that occurred

details.description: Additional details about what went wrong with the request.

players.description: The list of players in the team.

fqdn.description: The URL of the game server that the ticket has been assigned to.

ports.description: A mapping of the configured port names to the port configuration that the game server is listening on.

TicketAssignmentResponse.description: Describes the assignment of a ticket to a game server.
